timeline.title: Neo
timeline.deleteConfirm: Delete this record? This cannot be undone.

timeline.emptyContent: No records yet. Tap New in the top-right to make the first one.

timelineDemo.item1: The first tiny note of 2024: we decided to use a timeline to keep every ordinary but important moment.
timelineDemo.item2: We cleared a corner at home, hoping to turn it into Neo's little reading nook in the future.
timelineDemo.item3: First note of 2025: we started regular walks. Ten minutes a day, like saving up a little patience for the future.
timelineDemo.item4: Sorted and backed up photos, hoping every trip and every laugh will stay somewhere Neo can see one day.
timelineDemo.item5: Today we seriously arranged Neo's little wardrobe for the first time. Every piece is so tiny, like a slow letter to the future.
timelineDemo.item6: We went for a follow-up this afternoon, and the doctor said everything looked steady. On the way home we bought blueberry cake to celebrate this ordinary glowing little day.
timelineDemo.item7: Demo card check: gradient scroll line, axis through the center point, blurred background on open, plus the 3D card.
